description_long: This is a single-story residential house surrounded by a small, neatly landscaped yard with several mature trees and shrubs. The house features a rectangular footprint with a prominent front entryway, which is accessed by a short set of steps and flanked by a small porch area. The roof is moderately pitched and appears to be a gable style, with a simple, clean design. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the visible facades, providing balanced natural light. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely finished in stucco or painted siding, and the roof is a darker shade, possibly shingled. The property is bordered by a low fence or hedge, giving it a defined boundary within an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A single-story, light-colored house with a gable roof, surrounded by trees and a small yard, featuring a defined entryway and symmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, steps, porch, and a clear view of the house facade framed by trees.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the roof structure, yard layout, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs around the house.
description_view_2: Rear or side view with more trees obscuring the house, showing the boundary and landscaping details.
description_view_3: Alternate front/side view with the entryway visible, more of the porch area, and additional landscaping elements.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, small porch, and minimal decorative elements
